## Chosunbiz Confirms Samsung Yongin Plant Accelerated to 2029 Operations

Corroboration from a second Korean outlet increases conviction that the Yongin acceleration is confirmed policy rather than a single-source leak; strengthens the thesis that Samsung is leaning into the advanced foundry cycle.

- A second outlet (Chosunbiz) independently corroborates the Samsung Yongin acceleration story.
- 2029 operational target confirmed; no new capacity figures added beyond the prior report.
- Multi-outlet confirmation raises confidence on the foundry timeline pull-forward.
- High confidence per classifier.
